---
title: "Skills & Certifications"
---

# Technical Skills

## Cisco Voice Collaboration

Cisco Unified Communications Manager  
Cisco Expressway  
Cisco Meeting Server  
Cisco Unity Connection  

---

## Enterprise Collaboration Platforms

Microsoft Teams Calling  
Zoom Cloud Telephony  
Cisco Jabber  

---

## Compliance Recording Platforms

NICE Recording Systems  
Verint Recording Solutions  
Voice Biometrics  
Speech Analytics  

---

## Infrastructure & Architecture

VoIP Architecture  
Enterprise Communication Systems  
Network Infrastructure Design  
Voice Security and Compliance  

---

# Certifications

Avaya Certified Administrator  
NICE Perform Certified Administrator  
Convergence Technologies Professional (CTP)  
ITIL Framework Awareness
